instruction: Use TaskGroup to concurrently fetch images from multiple URLs and return the first successfully loaded UIImage.
Create a custom AsyncSequence that emits lines from a file as they are read asynchronously.
Bridge a UIKit UISearchBar into SwiftUI using UIViewRepresentable, including delegate coordination for text updates.
Implement a custom AsyncSequence that emits values from NotificationCenter notifications.
Use TaskGroup to concurrently process an array of integers, squaring each, and return the results in the original order.
Bridge an AppKit NSColorWell into SwiftUI using NSViewRepresentable, including two-way color binding.
Implement a SwiftUI view that uses a custom AsyncSequence to stream live location updates from CLLocationManager.
Use TaskGroup to concurrently download and decompress multiple files, returning the decompressed data in a dictionary keyed by URL.
Create a custom AsyncSequence that emits values from a Combine publisher.
Bridge a UIKit UIActivityIndicatorView into SwiftUI, exposing a binding for animating state.
